overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in Victorian-era clothing exploring a snowy village at night. The character moves through a bedroom, descends to a ground floor, exits into a village square, enters a tavern to explore its bar and kitchen areas, and finally exits to a mountain overlook. The video features high-quality game engine graphics with atmospheric lighting from candles, fireplaces, and moonlight.
